chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 991 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.5265/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.5266/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.5267/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 11.03.2025 Mr. Abdallah Azzam Naqvi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3 & 4. Learned AAG is present and waives notice. It is jointly submitted that the present petition pertains to the vires of imposition of Infrastructure Cess. It is added that the matter has already been determined by a Division Bench of this Court in the case of Ibrahim Fibres Ltd. vs. Province of Sindh and others (C.P.D 3309 of 2011 judgment dated 04.06.2021). Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the ratio of the aforesaid judgment is squarely applicable to the present facts and circumstances, hence, this petition may be dismissed in mutatis mutandis application thereof; leaving the petitioner at liberty to seek appellate remedy along with other similarly placed parties. Learned AAG submits that he has no objection to the dismissal of the petition in the manner as aforesaid. Order accordingly. The instant petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
